'''Yamamoto Hachimangū''' (山本八幡宮) refers to several [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] of the [[:en:Hachiman shrine|Hachiman Shrine]] type.

* {{ill|Yamamoto Hachimangū (Fujinomiya City)|ja|山本八幡宮 (富士宮市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamamoto Hachimangū (Fujinomiya City)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|Fujinomiya City]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]].
* {{ill|Yamamoto Hachimangū (Yao City)|ja|山本八幡宮 (八尾市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamamoto Hachimangū (Yao City)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Yao, Osaka|Yao City]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]].
